name: Duty
description: HX duty (If negative swap parameter HotSide to Shell/Tube)

name: dir
description: HX duty direction to use when shell side is cold

name: DutyAbs
description: HX absolute duty (used to check temperature crossover)

name: VFto
description: HX tube side outlet molar vapor fraction\nVLE: unbounded VFu where VFu < 0 is subcooled, VFu = 0 is the bubble point, VFu = 1 is the dew point, and VFu > 1 is superheated\nVLLE: bounded VF (0 ≤ VF ≤ 1) where VF = 0 is the bubble point (or subcooled) and VF = 1 is the dew point (or superheated)

name: DPt
description: HX tube side pressure drop (use full properties to set reference conditions in TubeSide submodel)

name: Cpt
description: HX tube side molar heat capacity

name: DTtito
description: HX tube inlet - tube outlet temperature difference
